description: Mia+Hector 2-hero combo — Lanc+Inf class heroes. Mia S2 (50% chance) and S3 (40% chance) buff lancers; Hector S1 (40% chance) buffs infantry. Both have chance skills → run 5 battles. WIP attacks (no hero, t6 troops), minxxx defends with Mia+Hector. Tests lancer+infantry buff interaction across Lancer+Infantry hero classes.
